hero.subtitle: Turning ideas into modern, high-performance and scalable web applications

about.title: About
about.p1_rest: . I am currently pursuing a Computer Science degree and have been building personal and real-world freelance projects using modern web technologies.
about.p2: I come from a career transition, an experience that gave me a solid professional background and helped me develop important soft skills. Throughout this journey, I built competencies such as organization, communication, teamwork and adaptability — all of which I consider fundamental in my work as a developer.
about.p3: I am comfortable building full-stack applications from front-end to back-end, always seeking to grow technically and understand the real impact of the solutions I create.
about.p4: I consider myself a motivated, collaborative and fast-learning person, comfortable working in teams and handling diverse challenges. I am always looking to evolve, learn and contribute, believing that technology is a powerful tool to turn ideas into real solutions.
